description: Life on the second and third lines series #2. Play to get a chance of life, or play T for tenuki if white is unconditionally dead. Other problem(s) in the series: 22639, 22803, 22829, 22339. Sorry for the lack of incorrect variations earlier; I have added some more. If you turn on "public attempts" in your user settings, I can see which variations you played, and know which ones to add.

AW [mr][nr][pq][rr][sr]

C [Can white live or get a ko? If so, then live. If not, tenuki at T.]

(; W [mo]; AB [mr][nr][pq][rr][sr] AW [kr][lr][mq][nq][op][pp][qp][ro][rq][sq] B [pr] C [The colors have swapped. Show why Q2 doesn't live.] (; W [rs]; B [qs] (; W [qq]; B [qr]; W [or]; B [oq]; W [os] C [RIGHT][Correct.])(; W [os]; B [qq]; W [ps]; B [or] C [Ko. You could (and should) have killed unconditionally.])(; W [or]; B [qq])(; W [oq]; B [qq]))(; W [qs]; B [qr])(; W [qr]; B [qq]; W [qs]; B [ps])(; W [qq]; B [qr])(; W [ps]; B [qs])(; W [os]; B [or])(; W [ns]; B [qq]; W [qs]; B [rs])(; W [ms]; B [qq]; W [qs]; B [rs])(; W [or]; B [qq]; W [qs]; B [ps]; W [rs]; B [oq]))

(; W [qq]; B [or])
(; W [qr]; B [or])
(; W [ps]; B [qr])
